capabilities.name: last_value
capabilities.description: Repeat the latest observed demand as a simple baseline.
capabilities.input_contract: non-negative daily demand history and positive horizon
capabilities.output_contract: non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory

capabilities.name: moving_average
capabilities.description: Forecast with the mean of the most recent demand window.
capabilities.input_contract: non-negative daily demand history and positive horizon
capabilities.output_contract: non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory

capabilities.name: seasonal_naive
capabilities.description: Repeat the latest seasonal pattern over the forecast horizon.
capabilities.input_contract: non-negative daily demand history and positive horizon
capabilities.output_contract: non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory

capabilities.name: croston
capabilities.description: Classic Croston forecast for intermittent demand.
capabilities.input_contract: non-negative daily demand history and positive horizon
capabilities.output_contract: non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory

capabilities.name: ridge_lag
capabilities.description: Autoregressive ridge model using leakage-safe lag features.
capabilities.input_contract: non-negative daily demand history and positive horizon
capabilities.output_contract: non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory
